title: Figure 11 from: Pourmoghaddam MJ, Lambert C, Voglmayr H, Khodaparast SA, Stadler M (2026) A polyphasic study of Hypoxylaceae (Xylariales, Ascomycota) in Iran: new species and records from Hyrcanian forests. MycoKeys 131: 1-40. https://doi.org/10.3897/mycokeys.131.186541
author: Pourmoghaddam, Mohammad Javad
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 11 Hypoxylon larissae (GUM 1602). A. Stromatal habit; B, C. Close-up view of stromatal surface; D. Stroma in vertical section showing perithecia; E. KOH-extractable pigments from stroma; F. Immature ascus in water; G. Immature ascus in Melzer's reagent; H. Mature ascus in Melzer's reagent; I. Ascus tip in Melzer's reagent; J. Ascospore in Melzer's reagent with straight germ slit; K, L. Ascospores in 10% KOH with dehiscent perispore. Scale bars: 4 mm (A); 1 mm (B, C); 0.5 mm (D); 20 µm (F–H); 10 µm (I–L).
